title: June Track Request
description: Request body schema for the June Tracking API /track endpoint.

userId.description: The ID for this user in your database. At least one of userId or anonymousId must be provided.

anonymousId.description: An ID associated with the user when you do not know who they are.

event.description: The name of the event you are tracking.

properties.description: A dictionary of properties for the event.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 date-time when the track took place. Defaults to server time if omitted.

context.description: Extra context to attach to the call.

groupId.description: Group or company identifier to associate the event with.

locale.description: The locale of the user, e.g. en-US.

timezone.description: The user's timezone in tzdata format.
